title: 💼 Hiring: Senior Infrastructure Engineer - Chainalysis
description_short:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 1 day ago - May 15, 2026 | 💰 Competitive | 🧑‍💻 Full-time | 🔗 Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions

Chainalysis is hiring a Senior Infrastructure Enginee...
description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 1 day ago - May 15, 2026 | 💰 Competitive | 🧑‍💻 Full-time | 🔗 Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions

Chainalysis is hiring a Senior Infrastructure Engineer to lead the design and evolution of Kubernetes clusters and manage AWS-based environments for high-security government customers. The company ensures reliability, automation, and scalability in critical infrastructure.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Lead the design and evolution of RKE2 Kubernetes clusters across dev, acceptance, and production — upgrades, capacity planning, networking, and resilience
- Architect and maintain Infrastructure as Code with Terraform for AWS environments, building scalable patterns and modules
- Own the CI/CD platform using GitHub Actions end-to-end, improving pipelines and release reliability
- Drive GitOps delivery with Flux CD, Helm charts, and Kustomize
- Manage container image lifecycle, monitoring, alerting, and incident response
- Own security posture including secrets, RBAC, and compliance
- Mentor engineers and serve as technical contact for product teams

🔑 Requirements:
- Deep production Kubernetes experience at scale (cluster management, Helm, networking, troubleshooting)
- Expert Terraform proficiency for multi-environment cloud infrastructure
- Strong Linux systems administration and shell scripting
- Extensive CI/CD pipeline experience (GitHub Actions preferred)
- Deep AWS services knowledge (EC2, VPC, IAM, etc.)
- Strong operational mindset focused on reliability and automation

💡 Perks & Benefits: Competitive compensation and the opportunity to solve hard technical challenges in blockchain analytics with a global team.

📩 To apply: Submit your application here: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/chainalysis-careers/0782bd50-fc84-45e5-a517-835bb2a79e37
